title: Conduct complex tree hazard and health assessment post-fire
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct complex tree hazard and health assessment post-fire demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to undertake assessment of fire damaged or fire affected tree

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from work plan or instruction and, where required, seek clarification from appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from work plan or instruction and, where required, seek clarification from appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from work plan or instruction and, where required, seek clarification from appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Follow environmental and safety procedures, including use of personal protective equipment, hazard and risk control measures for the work tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow environmental and safety procedures, including use of personal protective equipment, hazard and risk control measures for the work tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow environmental and safety procedures, including use of personal protective equipment, hazard and risk control measures for the work tasks.

pcs.text: Assess and maintain up to date information on topography and weather conditions in areas where tree assessments are to be conducted
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and maintain up to date information on topography and weather conditions in areas where tree assessments are to be conducted?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and maintain up to date information on topography and weather conditions in areas where tree assessments are to be conducted.

pcs.text: Confirm chain of command and communication protocols that apply in bushfire containment and recovery operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm chain of command and communication protocols that apply in bushfire containment and recovery operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm chain of command and communication protocols that apply in bushfire containment and recovery operations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to undertake assessment of fire damaged or fire affected tree

elements.title: Conduct hazard assessment of fire damaged or fire affected tree

pcs.text: Conduct hazard assessment for route to and areas around tree to determine it is safe to approach
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct hazard assessment for route to and areas around tree to determine it is safe to approach?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct hazard assessment for route to and areas around tree to determine it is safe to approach.

pcs.text: Locate and determine tree species and tree position in relation to site topography and other hazards at site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and determine tree species and tree position in relation to site topography and other hazards at site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and determine tree species and tree position in relation to site topography and other hazards at site.

pcs.text: Visually assess extent of fire damage to crown, trunk and root
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Visually assess extent of fire damage to crown, trunk and root?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Visually assess extent of fire damage to crown, trunk and root.

pcs.text: Identify structural and physiological defects in tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify structural and physiological defects in tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify structural and physiological defects in tree.

pcs.text: Assess external factors that may cause tree or its limbs and branches to fall
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess external factors that may cause tree or its limbs and branches to fall?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess external factors that may cause tree or its limbs and branches to fall.

pcs.text: Determine risks posed by tree according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine risks posed by tree according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine risks posed by tree according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures.

pcs.text: Identify tree hazard class according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tree hazard class according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tree hazard class according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures.

pcs.text: Determine appropriate risk treatment to mitigate tree hazard according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine appropriate risk treatment to mitigate tree hazard according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine appropriate risk treatment to mitigate tree hazard according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Conduct hazard assessment of fire damaged or fire affected tree

elements.title: Conduct assessment of health and values of fire damaged or fire affected tree

pcs.text: Determine fire impact on soil and its properties, and subsequent effects of soil on tree root and sap function
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine fire impact on soil and its properties, and subsequent effects of soil on tree root and sap function?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine fire impact on soil and its properties, and subsequent effects of soil on tree root and sap function.

pcs.text: Assess solid components of tree and determine whether there is adequate wood present to sustain tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess solid components of tree and determine whether there is adequate wood present to sustain tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess solid components of tree and determine whether there is adequate wood present to sustain tree.

pcs.text: Assess post-fire survivability of tree based on its species, fire damage and estimated age and dimensions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess post-fire survivability of tree based on its species, fire damage and estimated age and dimensions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess post-fire survivability of tree based on its species, fire damage and estimated age and dimensions.

pcs.text: Assess ecological, cultural and economic values of tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess ecological, cultural and economic values of tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess ecological, cultural and economic values of tree.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct assessment of health and values of fire damaged or fire affected tree

elements.title: Assess options for treatment of fire damaged or fire affected tree

pcs.text: Determine treatment options for tree taking into account tree hazard, health and values assessment and according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine treatment options for tree taking into account tree hazard, health and values assessment and according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine treatment options for tree taking into account tree hazard, health and values assessment and according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures.

pcs.text: Mark tree for treatment according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Mark tree for treatment according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark tree for treatment according to industry guidelines and agency approved procedures.

pcs.text: Record position of tree using Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) or manual mapping
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record position of tree using Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) or manual mapping?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record position of tree using Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) or manual mapping.

pcs.text: Record and report outcomes of tree assessment including proposed treatment to appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report outcomes of tree assessment including proposed treatment to appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report outcomes of tree assessment including proposed treatment to appropriate personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Assess options for treatment of fire damaged or fire affected tree
